PluginData.Author: OwendB
PluginData.Tooltip: Server-side anti-cheat guards and admin audit logging
PluginData.Description:
Anti-Cheat is a Magnetar server plugin for Space Engineers dedicated servers. It adds configurable server-side enforcement around malformed client RPCs, validation failures, oversized payloads, and admin creative-tool activity.
Current protections include toolbar request validation, camera-setting bounds, GPS and faction payload length caps, social-list and known-sector overflow guards, player color-list validation, ship tool target caps, grinder stockpile suppression, ownerless toolbar cleanup, terminal property bounds sanitization, and escalation for repeated validation failures.
The admin audit module logs creative tools toggles, creative/admin block placement, creative-mode welding, paste/delete/cut, ownership changes, forced toolbar cleanup, and terminal value sanitization so staff actions leave a clear server-side trail.
